title: node.runtime
description: The per-node runtime state file (nodes/<node_id>/node.runtime.yaml). Holds the runtime_subgraphs[] list — the lightweight subgraphs hosted by a single node. Field names and enum values are locked byte-for-byte per references/subgraph_subloop_policy.md §8. A subgraph carries its OWN 8-value status enum (proposed, admitted, running, blocked, completed, failed, promoted_to_subloop, cancelled) — DISTINCT from the 15 canonical node statuses, which MUST NOT be applied to a subgraph.

node_id.description: The id of the parent node (in loop.plan.yaml) whose runtime subgraphs this file hosts.

runtime_subgraphs.description: The list of subgraphs hosted by this node. May be empty ([]).

subgraph_status.description: A subgraph's status. The 8 subgraph statuses — DISTINCT from the 15 node statuses; never apply a node status to a subgraph. Terminal: completed, failed, promoted_to_subloop, cancelled.

subgraph.description: A single hosted subgraph. Carries the minimal 8-field set plus optional enhancement fields.

subgraph_id.description: The subgraph's id. Pattern SG-<parent-node-id-short>-<seq> (prefix SG-, 3-digit zero-padded seq; e.g. SG-N4-001). Immutable once created.

title.description: Short human-readable name of the subgraph.

status.description: One of the 8 subgraph statuses — not a node status.

spawn_reason.description: Why the subgraph was created (which local need it serves).

scope.description: The subgraph's boundary. Each list may be empty ([]).

in.description: What is in scope for this subgraph. May be empty ([]).

out.description: What is explicitly out of scope for this subgraph. May be empty ([]).

id.description: Local node id within the subgraph.

title.description: Short human-readable name of the local node.

status.description: The local node's status. One of the 8 subgraph statuses — not a node status.

output.description: The artifact path this local node produced, or null if none yet.

edges.description: Dependency edges as [from, to] pairs of local node ids. May be empty ([]).

items.description: A [from, to] pair of local node ids.

required_outputs.description: The artifact paths required before the subgraph may complete. May be empty ([]).

pass_condition.description: The condition that must hold for the subgraph to pass its completion gate.

outputs.description: The artifact paths the subgraph produced. May be empty ([]).

promotion_policy.description: The local promotion policy: {status, promote_to_subloop_if[]}. Governs when this subgraph is promoted to a subloop (Promotion Gate).

status.description: The current promotion status of this subgraph (e.g. not_promoted, promoted_to_subloop).

promote_to_subloop_if.description: The list of promotion conditions that, if any holds, escalate this subgraph to a subloop.

priority.description: Optional enhancement field: scheduling priority of the subgraph.

risk_level.description: Optional enhancement field: the subgraph's risk level.

owner_agent.description: Optional enhancement field: the agent that owns the subgraph.

created_at.description: Optional enhancement field: when the subgraph was created (ISO-8601 date-time).

updated_at.description: Optional enhancement field: when the subgraph was last updated (ISO-8601 date-time).

evidence_refs.description: Optional enhancement field: references to supporting evidence.

decision_refs.description: Optional enhancement field: references to related decision.log.md entries.

attempt_count.description: Optional enhancement field: how many attempts the subgraph has taken.

max_attempts.description: Optional enhancement field: the subgraph's attempt budget.
